Solution 02

Encryption Solutions

Enterprise-grade encryption and key management solutions to ensure your critical data remains protected wherever it lives -- on-premises, in the cloud, or in transit.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

OP
OpenText Information Security
＋ View details
OP

OpenText

Information Security

OpenText Voltage provides format-preserving encryption, tokenisation, and data masking -- enabling enterprises to protect sensitive data while keeping business processes intact.

Key Features

  • Format-preserving encryption (FPE) for structured data
  • Tokenisation for PCI-DSS compliance
  • Data masking for non-production environments
  • Stateless key management
  • Integration with Oracle, SAP, and mainframes

Use Cases

  • ✓ Protect credit card numbers without changing application logic
  • ✓ Mask customer PII in test and dev environments
  • ✓ Achieve PCI-DSS compliance with minimal re-engineering
Why CrewTEC recommends OpenText

OpenText Voltage is the gold standard for format-preserving encryption. CrewTEC specialises in integrating Voltage with existing enterprise applications with zero downtime.

Interested in OpenText? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for OpenText →
EN
Entrust Digital Identity & Encryption
＋ View details
EN

Entrust

Digital Identity & Encryption

Entrust provides comprehensive encryption, PKI, and key management solutions that secure identities, transactions, and data across enterprise and cloud environments.

Key Features

  • Enterprise PKI and certificate lifecycle management
  • Hardware-rooted key management
  • Document and code signing
  • TLS/SSL certificate management
  • Cloud key management integration

Use Cases

  • ✓ Build and manage an enterprise PKI from scratch
  • ✓ Automate TLS certificate renewal to prevent outages
  • ✓ Enable legally binding digital signatures on documents
Why CrewTEC recommends Entrust

Entrust brings 25+ years of cryptography expertise. CrewTEC deploys Entrust PKI and certificate management for banks, government, and large enterprises across India.

Interested in Entrust? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Entrust →
TH
Thales Data Protection Platform
＋ View details
TH

Thales

Data Protection Platform

Thales CipherTrust Data Security Platform unifies data discovery, classification, encryption, and key management in a single platform for on-premises and multi-cloud environments.

Key Features

  • CipherTrust Manager for centralised key management
  • Transparent encryption for files and databases
  • Data discovery and classification
  • Cloud key management (BYOK/HYOK)
  • Secrets management for DevOps

Use Cases

  • ✓ Discover and classify sensitive data across the entire estate
  • ✓ Bring your own keys to AWS, Azure, and GCP
  • ✓ Meet RBI data localisation and encryption mandates
Why CrewTEC recommends Thales

Thales is a Gartner Magic Quadrant leader for data security. CrewTEC is a Thales certified partner with proven deployments in BFSI, healthcare, and government sectors in India.

Interested in Thales? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Thales →
FO
Fortanix Runtime Encryption
＋ View details
FO

Fortanix

Runtime Encryption

Fortanix pioneered Runtime Encryption using Intel SGX to protect data while it is being processed -- the final frontier of data protection beyond rest and transit.

Key Features

  • Runtime Encryption with Intel SGX enclaves
  • Confidential computing for sensitive workloads
  • SaaS-based key management (DSM)
  • Secrets management for cloud-native apps
  • FIPS 140-2 Level 3 validated

Use Cases

  • ✓ Protect sensitive data even from cloud provider administrators
  • ✓ Run regulated workloads in untrusted cloud environments
  • ✓ Manage secrets for Kubernetes and DevOps pipelines securely
Why CrewTEC recommends Fortanix

Fortanix addresses the most advanced threat model -- data in use. CrewTEC deploys Fortanix for organisations with the most sensitive data requirements including financial and defence.

Interested in Fortanix? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Fortanix →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Encrypt sensitive data across databases, files, and applications
  • ✓ Manage cryptographic keys centrally with FIPS 140-2 compliance
  • ✓ Protect data in use with confidential computing
  • ✓ Meet regulatory requirements for data encryption (RBI, SEBI, GDPR)
  • ✓ Enable tokenisation and format-preserving encryption

Key Features

FIPS 140-2 validated encryption modules

Centralised key lifecycle management

Transparent data encryption with no app changes

Cloud key management integration (AWS, GCP, Azure)

Format-preserving encryption for structured data
